---
title: "Page 6 - Interactive Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec07-sp06"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Interactive learning

_A brief explanation of the interactive task or tool to orient the learner._

---

## Try it

_Insert your interactive component here (e.g., a simulation, clickable diagram, or embedded JS activity)._

---

## Instructions

_Provide clear guidance on how to use the interactive element._

---

## What to notice

_Call out 2-3 specific features, trends, or behaviors the learner should pay attention to while interacting._

---

## Follow-up

_Add an optional reflection, interpretation, or next-step prompt for after the interaction is completed._

---





---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short introduction for this deep self-check._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.self-check data-variant="deep"}
**Quick Self-Check**

<!-- editable:start body -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide 2-4 questions for the learner to consider._]

- Question 1
- Question 2
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Reflection guidance**

<!-- editable:start feedback -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a model answer or reflection points._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction if appropriate for this scenario response task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.scenario-response}
**Scenario Challenge**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe a realistic or authentic scenario corresponding to the learning objectives._]

**What would you do?**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Ask the learner to respond or take action in this scenario._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Guidance and Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for different responses._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the scenario._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add framing for this PYTHON example._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.code-example}
**Code in Action**

```python
<!-- editable:start code -->
# Add your code here
<!-- editable:end -->
```

**Interpretation:**
<!-- editable:start interpretation -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Explain what this code does._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a follow-up prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set expectations for looking at this code output or result._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.output-analysis}
**Output Analysis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the code output or result placeholder here._]

**Interpretation:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Deep-Dive**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a detailed analysis of what these results mean for the broader context._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the output interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Discussion Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp07.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 7 - Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
